persona.mission: Create a high-performance, visually distinct Project Management Dashboard for an Advertising Agency. Avoid generic SaaS tropes. Prioritize clarity, density, and workflow velocity.

headings.usage: Use for all page titles, section headers, and widget titles.

primary.name: Obsidian Slate
primary.usage: Primary buttons, active states, main navigation.

colors.rules: Avoid gradients. Use solid, high-contrast colors. Use text-slate-500 for metadata.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Only for sticky headers: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-200

dashboard_grid.rules: Sidebar is fixed width (260px). Main content area fills remaining space. Widgets snap to grid.

navigation.style: Fixed, full height, border-r border-slate-200, bg-white

cards.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:border-slate-300 transition-colors duration-200

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium shadow-sm transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:text-slate-900 rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 hover:text-slate-900 rounded-md px-3 py-1.5 transition-all

tables.header: text-xs text-slate-500 uppercase bg-slate-50 font-semibold tracking-wider

project_detail.title: Project Workspace
widgets: Workflow Tracker (Stepper: Strategy > Production > Post > Client)

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Manrope' for all headings. Import it from Google Fonts.
Implement the 'Bento Grid' layout for the dashboard. Use 'grid-cols-12' and 'col-span-x' utility classes.
Use Shadcn UI components but override the default 'rounded-xl' with 'rounded-md' for a sharper, more professional look.
For the Timeline/Gantt view, use a simple HTML/CSS grid implementation if a library is not available, or use a list view with progress bars.
Ensure all interactive elements have hover states that change border color or background lightness.
The Sidebar must be fixed on the left. On mobile, it should be a Sheet/Drawer.
Use the provided image URLs for project thumbnails and user avatars to make the mockups feel real.
DO NOT use gradients for backgrounds. Stick to flat colors (White/Slate-50).
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons and inputs.
universal_guidelines: Create depth through layered design elements (z-index).
Use glass-morphism effects only for sticky headers.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Never use AI assistant Emoji characters.
